        break;
    }
    return 1; /* we printed a ppp packet */
}

results.message: Potential uncontrolled recursion (mutual (via ppp_hdlc)): 'handle_ppp()' calls itself without a visible depth guard. Crafted input may cause stack overflow.

properties.description:
Flags functions that call themselves (directly or via a short mutual-recursion cycle)
 without an apparent depth counter guard. In parsing libraries like libxml2, crafted
 input with deep nesting can exhaust the stack.

 PATTERN (direct recursion, no depth guard):
   void parseElement(xmlParserCtxtPtr ctxt) {
       ...
       parseElement(ctxt);   // recursive call
       ...
   }
   // No check like: if (ctxt->depth++ > MAX_DEPTH) return;

 PATTERN (mutual recursion):
   parseContent() → parseElement() → parseContent()  // cycle without depth check

 Historic bugs caught:
   - CVE-2025-9714: XPath evaluation uncontrolled recursion → stack overflow
   - CVE-2025-8732: xmlParseSGMLCatalog uncontrolled recursion
   - CVE-2017-16932: DTD parameter entity infinite recursion
   - Multiple entity expansion / billion laughs variants
properties.name: CWE-674: Uncontrolled Recursion — recursive function without depth guard
properties.shortDescription: Recursive function lacks a depth/recursion-limit check, risking stack overflow.

results.message:
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field 'duration' read through pointer of type unsigned char in ieee_802_11_hdr_print(). This type is freed in signature_verify() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field 'duration' read through pointer of type unsigned char in ieee_802_11_hdr_print(). This type is freed in esp_print_decrypt_buffer_by_ikev2() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field 'duration' read through pointer of type unsigned char in ieee_802_11_hdr_print(). This type is freed in esp_print() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field 'duration' read through pointer of type unsigned char in ieee_802_11_hdr_print(). This type is freed in ppp_hdlc() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.

properties.description:
Detects when a pointer to a freed object is dereferenced to read
              a field, and the freed memory could have been reclaimed by a
              different type. This enables information leaks.

              Pattern: Object A is freed. Stale pointer still exists.
              Memory is reclaimed by Object B (different type).
              Reading field through stale pointer yields B's data as A's type.

              In kernel: reading chain->dev->name after net_device is freed and
              memory reclaimed by packet_fanout reveals fanout's net pointer.
properties.name: WMI-2: Information Leak via Type Confusion (Stale Pointer Dereference)

              a field, and the freed memory could have been reclaimed by a
              different type. This enables information leaks.

              memory reclaimed by packet_fanout reveals fanout's net pointer.
